mapper.insert: INSERT INTO organization_members (id, organization_id, user_id, role, is_favorite, joined_at, last_active) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{role, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UserRoleTypeHandler}, #{isFavorite}, #{joinedAt}, #{lastActive} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, organization_id, user_id, role, is_favorite, joined_at, last_active FROM organization_members WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY joined_at ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM organization_members WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
